packs.name: Core Craft - A Vanilla Expansion | NEW: Villages Update
packs.summary: A Vanilla+ survival expansion for Minecraft Bedrock Edition with overhauled world generation, new mobs, animals, quests, structures and furniture.
packs.description:
Join the Core Craft Discord Server to join the community, provide feedback and to play together!

1.1 UPDATE: Villages Update

  • Advanced Village Variants
  • Advanced Villagers
  • Villager Soldiers
  • Advanced Iron Golems
  • Illager Variants
  • Spanish, Portugese, Korean & Dutch language support
  • & More!

NEW 1.1.8 UPDATE: Block Update

  • Many new Block sets that have a Full Block, a Slab, Stairs and a Wall Block
  • Cactus and Palm full Woodsets with all of their corresponding blocks and items, including Furniture, Boats, Buttons, Pressure Plates, Doors and more.


Core Craft transforms Minecraft into a richer survival-RPG experience packed with new adventures, creatures, and ways to play. Explore a world full of quests, structures, unique mobs, and immersive systems designed to make your gameplay deeper and more rewarding.

Key Features

  • Quest System – Meet the Quest Master, collect tasks, and track your progress with the Quest Book. Earn rewards by completing objectives or restart quests for a new challenge.
  • New Mobs – Encounter fresh wildlife, dangerous monsters, and even mystical beings like mermaids and sirens.
  • Expanded Survival – Grow new crops, cook fresh recipes, and discover unique farming and cooking mechanics.
  • World Variety – Decorate your home with furniture, explore lush foliage, and collect rare resources such as Ruby.
  • Built-in Guidebook – Use the Core Craft Wiki Book to learn about every new feature without leaving the game.

Step into Core Craft and give your Minecraft world new life with quests, creatures, and creative possibilities!

 

 

 Live together with New Animals & Fight new Monsters

Core Craft introduces wildlife with an animal-friendly mindset. You can collect every unique drop and progress through the game without harming any animals.

Face dangerous new threats lurking across the world. From shadow creatures to powerful mini bosses, every encounter brings fresh challenges and rewards.


Learn Through the In-Game Core Craft Wiki

No need to guess! Every feature (items, mobs, mechanics, and systems) is explained in the Core Craft Wiki Book, available right inside the game.

 

  Embark on Quests & Adventures

Meet the Quest Master and take on tasks across the world. Use the Quest Book to track progress, earn rewards, and revisit completed challenges.

 

Grow, Cook & Survive

Discover new crops, ingredients, and recipes. Farming and cooking are expanded with fresh systems that make survival deeper and more rewarding.

 

  Sell your items via Market Stands 

The Market Stand block lets you sell different categories of items to visitor traders. The higher your market stand, the better the rewards. 

 

  Decorate with Furniture & Foliage

Customize your builds with new furniture, decorations, and lush world plants. Bring life and detail to every corner of your world.

 

 Start Rituals & collect Legendary Weapons

Capture the spirit from an elemental mob to start a ritual at a Ritual Core. Fight off the waves summoned by all the Astrals and collect the Legendary Weapons.

These Legendary Weapons wield special powers, use them to slay your enemies.

Coming Soon

Core Craft will be updated in the future with new features and bug fixes.
The current roadmap is currently being planned out:

  • End Update
    • New biomes
    • New mobs
    • New quests
  • New Underground structures

Join the Core Craft Discord Server to join the community, provide feedback and to play together!
packs.author: CoreCraft

packs.name: SERP Pokédrock (Pokémon Addon) || 1.31.3 Dual & Visual Update
packs.summary: Welcome to the world of Pokédrock! This addon have a battle system, mounts, a lot of mechanics and real evolutions. If you want to enjoy the full experience of the addon, install all resource packs!
packs.description:
FOLLOW THE CORRECT RESOURCES ACTIVATION ORDER

You can see the changelog and other explainations with officer Jenny

To start a new game, enter in your world, choose your favorite region and your favorite starter Pokémon. Then you will receive your starter a beginner kit and 2 charges for your Pokévial. You can use the command "/pokereset @s" to reset your data if you want to start again or if you want to update or fix important bugs.

The Pokémon center will be the most important structure of your adventure. It appear in the plains and the desert, there you will find everything you need to improve your gaming experience

The battle system has many improvements, it is the same as the original games. It has mega evolutions, Dynamax and its own mechanic called "boost" that consumes experience to raise all stats by 3 turns!

You can start a battle throwing your Pokémon (crouching and opening your menu) to a wild Pokémon or approaching a trainer

 

Basic interactions with your Pokémon

-You can use your Pokédex to test your Pokémon's mount and evolutions. Some Pokémon evolve by item interaction or trading. ALL evolution methods are in the Pokédex, so check it regularly.

The Pokéradar is a new feature that lets you search for Pokémon near you. In addition, the Pokédex now includes a biome detector to help you find specific Pokémon.

 

Berry plants will appear in Pokévillages. You can plant new berries with their seeds, there are some recipes you can make with them!

Apricorn plants will appear over the world. With its fruit you can create some Pokéballs!

 

When mining you will find some ores that will contain evo stones, mega stones, key stones or wishing stars. It will help you progress in your adventure and get improvements

Now the Bike and the Ride pager can be obtained in the Game corner. It will serve as transport to reach more difficult or high places, also to explore more easily.

Now you can use backpacks! They function as a Bundle, but you can wear them in the chestplate slot and it give you armor.

You can also paint your Pokédex and Backpack!

Build changelog:

-Berries that lower EVs were added
-The behavior of the Poképuffs was improved
-Trading evolutions were fixed
-Rotom Communicator was fixed
-Hatching eggs was fixed
-Hoopa ring was fixed
-Now all berries can be planted
-Now all apricorns can be planted
-Most of the items were retextured
-New designs for all berry plants
-Evolution now has particles and music
-Improved effects and animations
-Minor bug fixes
packs.author: ZacekElSerpentin

packs.name: Bedrock Reimagined v1.0.906 [MINI-MAP]
packs.summary: Explore a reimagined Minecraft Bedrock experience with a new gameplay loop; defeat bosses to get to the end. Use magic, new weapons and tools, and your skill to defeat the game!
packs.description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD FOR UPDATES!

Bedrock Reimagined transforms the vanilla Bedrock experience with new mobs, bosses, structures, magic systems, and a completely new way to beat the game on top of a full custom resource pack with enhanced mob animations, textures, and Vibrant Visuals.

Bedrock Reimagined Features

  • Epic Bosses & Mini-Bosses to challenge powerful adventurers
  • Custom Structures scattered across the world
  • Procedurally Generating Mineshafts full of mobs and loot
  • New Hostile Mobs to battle across every biome
  • Pets, Passive Animals, and Ambient Creatures that bring the world to life
  • Magic & Mana System with powerful magical items
  • Machines, Pipes, Quaries, and Automation Systems
  • World Events like Sandstorms, Meteor Showers, and the Maple Event
  • New Ores, Armor, Weapons, and Tools with progression integrated into vanilla gameplay
  • Custom Backpacks, Hats, and Charms to enhance your adventure
  • Hundreds of Decorative Blocks, including beds, banners, lamps, and more
  • RPG-Style Quest System with unique quests and rewards
  • Custom Biome Generation with new biomes and enhanced vanilla generation
  • Custom UI Elements, including WAILA (What Am I Looking At) and a Minimap

And so much more to explore in one of Bedrock’s largest FREE expansions!

 

Minimap / What Am I Looking At (WAILA) 

 Dynamic Quest System / Custom Gameplay

 

 

 

 

FAQ / Device Settings: 

Bedrock Reimagined is a large pack requiring hefty hardware. You may lag on low-end devices. There is currently a stutter on most mobile devices. We are working to fix this issue. We are working on ALL optimizations to make the pack better to play. 

 

For a smooth mobile experience, we recommend at 8GB+ of memory, Vibrant Visuals disabled, and a 7-chunk render distance. 

Bedrock Reimagined is compatible with Actions and Stuff. Please disable the Bedrock Reimagined Resource Pack for full functionality. 

 

Join our Discord: 

Bedrock Reimagined has a lot to it, and it can be confusing at times. Find others to play with, ask for tips, and make suggestions for future updates!
packs.author: 5FrameStudios

packs.name: Effortless Building
packs.summary: Effortless Building brings Java's favourite multi-block placement mod to Bedrock! Place walls, floors, spheres, cylinders & more in seconds.
packs.description:
Effortless Building

Achievements Friendly & Survival Friendly
Lightweight Performance - Full Custom Block Support
Build smarter, not harder.

Effortless Building is a Bedrock addon inspired by the iconic Java mod of the same name by Requioss. Instead of placing blocks one at a time, you pick a build mode, click two or three times, and entire structures appear: lines, walls, floors, spheres, cones, diagonal ramps, and more, all while consuming the correct blocks from your survival inventory. v3 is the biggest update yet, adding Cut mode, the Cone shape, a 20-slot Clipboard Manager, Selection Zoom, ghost paste preview, Bezier curves, and a completely rebuilt Mode Selector with pinning and Quick Access.

PC Gameplay (By Eckosoldier)

Mobile Gameplay (Android/IOS)

✦ 14 Build Modes

Every mode works in both Survival and Creative. 2-step modes take two right-clicks (anchor then build). 3-step modes take three (anchor, XZ footprint, then height + build). Each mode has its own options toggled inside the Mode Selector.

2-Step Modes

  • Line - Straight or Bezier curve
  • Wall - Filled or Hollow
  • Floor - Filled or Hollow
  • Circle - Filled/Hollow, Even or Uneven (ellipse)
  • Sphere - Filled or Hollow
  • Semicircle - Horizontal, Arch, or Dome orientation; Filled or Hollow
  • Diagonal Line - Straight or Bezier curve

3-Step Modes

  • Cube - Filled, Hollow, or Skeleton
  • Cylinder - Filled/Hollow, Even or Uneven (ellipse)
  • Cone (new in v3) - Filled or Hollow
  • Diagonal Wall - Filled or Hollow
  • Slope Floor - Filled or Hollow
  • Copy / Paste (Cut action new in v3) - 3-click region selection

Special

  • Air Build - Single right-click to place one block in midair, no surface needed

Bezier curves (Line & Diagonal Line): right-click to add waypoints one by one, sneak+click to confirm; the addon traces a smooth 3D Catmull-Rom spline through all your points.

Air Building

Cube Shape

Line Mode

Circle Shape

Destroy Mode

Custom Blocks Support

 

 

✦ 3 Build Modifiers

Modifiers multiply every placement across symmetry patterns. They stack with each other and work on top of any build mode. Open them with Sneak + Left-click (swing) on the Building Book or via /menu.

  • Mirror: Reflect across the X, Y, and/or Z axis around a configurable center point. Set a radius so blocks beyond it are left untouched. Toggle "odd" alignment for center-block symmetry.
  • Array: Repeat the shape N times in any direction. Set a custom X/Y/Z offset and count to stamp rows, columns, arches, or staircases.
  • Radial: Rotate the shape around a center point into any number of evenly spaced slices. Enable alternate mode to mirror every other slice for kaleidoscope patterns.
  • Bonus: All three modifiers also apply to vanilla block placing and breaking, so no need to be in a shape mode.

 

✦ Block Palette System

Instead of always building with the block you right-clicked, you can source blocks from your hotbar or full inventory and paint them across your placement using one of 18 distribution patterns:

  • Random - Randomly distributed by block weight
  • Spread - Evenly repeating sequence
  • Gradient X / Y / Z - Smooth color transition along an axis
  • Radial Gradient - Transitions from center outward
  • Concentric Rings - Block A core, Block B ring, Block C outer, and so on
  • Checker - Alternating 3D checkerboard
  • Horizontal Stripes - Rows by Y level
  • Vertical Stripes - Columns along the dominant axis
  • Diagonal Stripes - Slanted column bands
  • Brick - Offset column stripes like real masonry
  • Herringbone - Alternating 45° zigzag
  • Value Noise - Smooth organic blobs
  • Cell Noise - Voronoi / stone-cell organic patches
  • Marble - Sine-warped streaks through noise
  • Border - Depth-based rings from outer edge inward
  • Wave - Sine wave across the shape
  • Spiral - Angle + distance spiral from center
  • Dissolve - Dithered noise-blended gradient (Best One)

Weight can be calculated by item count, slot count, or unique block (equal weight regardless of quantity). Open the palette with Left-click on the Building Book or /palette.

✦ Copy, Cut & Paste

Select a region with 3 clicks (XZ corner 1, XZ corner 2, then height). Works on blocks or in the air. Sneaking on click targets the block itself rather than its face, giving precise control in tight spaces.

  • Copy saves the selection to your clipboard.
  • Cut (new in v3) removes the blocks instantly with no drops and no tool required, and saves them to clipboard. In Survival, pasting a cut region is one-time use; the clipboard clears after the paste.
  • Paste by right-clicking anywhere. The structure automatically rotates to match your facing direction (N/E/S/W), including proper rotation of stairs, logs, doors, trapdoors, signs, and more.
  • Ghost Preview: hold your cursor still for 0.5 s and a countdown appears in the action bar (●●● → ●●○ → ●○○). At 3 s a transparent ghost of the copied structure appears at the target position; right-click while it's visible to confirm the paste.
  • Sneak + right-click clears the clipboard at any point.
  • In Survival, paste consumes blocks from your inventory.

✦ Clipboard Manager (new in v3)

Never lose a copied build again. The Clipboard Manager gives you 20 named save slots that persist across sessions and world reloads.

  • Every copy and cut auto-saves to an available slot
  • Click any slot to make it active, then paste it in Copy/Paste mode
  • Rename any slot (up to 32 characters)
  • Delete individual slots
  • Open with /clipboard or the Clipboard button inside the Mode Selector

✦ Destroy Mode

Hold a pickaxe, axe, or shovel and right-click to set a destroy anchor, then right-click again to destroy every block in the shape. Works with any active build mode.

  • Tool-aware: the correct tool is required per block type in Survival (a stone pickaxe can't mine iron ore, etc.)
  • Enchantment support: Fortune, Silk Touch, and Unbreaking are all respected and behave correctly
  • Durability tracking: the addon counts each block against your tool's durability and automatically switches to a spare tool of the same type when the active one breaks
  • XP drops: ore types correctly award XP on destruction
  • Survival drops: for large operations, drops are collected in bulk and spawned near your feet with a magnet pull effect
  • Admins can restrict Destroy Mode to Creative only, or disable it entirely per server/world

✦ Live Preview & Selection Zoom

While an anchor is set, the addon renders a real-time preview of exactly what will be placed before you confirm. Four preview styles to choose from:

  • Outline - full rendered block outline of the shape
  • Corner Outline - lightweight outline showing only the bounding box corners
  • Particles - particle cloud approximating the shape
  • Disabled - no preview for best performance

Preview refresh rate is adjustable across 7 levels from Smooth (every tick) to Minimal (every 20 ticks), tunable per player via /config.

Selection Zoom (new in v3): while your anchor is placed, the camera smoothly zooms in as your selection grows so you can see exactly where you're building. Zoom start distance (1-50 blocks) and max zoom level (1-200) are configurable per player. The camera resets automatically when you confirm, cancel, or rejoin.

✦ Undo & Redo

Made a mistake? In Creative mode, /undo steps back up to 10 operations and /redo steps forward again.

  • Operations under your undo threshold (default: 200 blocks) are saved to player data and survive rejoins and world reloads
  • Operations over the threshold are kept in memory only for the current session
  • Threshold is configurable per player: Disabled, 200, 500, or 1,000 blocks

✦ Mode Selector (redesigned in v3)

Open with right-click on the Building Book or menu.

  • Left panel: scrollable list of all 14 modes with the active mode highlighted in yellow
  • Star icon next to each mode: click to pin it; pinned modes float to the top of the list just below Disable
  • Right panel: per-mode options (Filled/Hollow, Even/Uneven, Bezier, etc.) that apply instantly
  • Quick Access panel (visible when Disable is selected): one-click shortcuts to Config, Palette, Settings, Tutorial, Undo, and Redo
  • Double-tap Sneak while holding the Building Book to toggle Disable mode on/off; your previous mode is restored automatically when you sneak-double-tap again

✦ Per-Player Settings

All settings are saved per player and persist across sessions. Open with /settings or Sneak + Right-click the Building Book.

  • Max blocks per operation (default 50,000, up to the admin-set ceiling)
  • Preview style: Particles, Outline, Corner Outline, or Disabled
  • Preview quality: 7 levels from Smooth (1 tick) to Minimal (20 ticks)
  • Air Build reach: 1 to 64 blocks
  • Infinite reach: toggle on/off and set custom distance
  • Build speed: Instant, Fast, Normal, or Slow
  • Undo threshold: Disabled, 200, 500, or 1,000 blocks
  • Replace existing blocks: on/off
  • Destroy drops items: on/off
  • Selection Zoom: on/off, zoom start distance, and max zoom level

 

✦ Admin & Server Controls

(Visible only to operators and players with the eb:admin tag)

The first player who joins a new world is automatically granted admin. On servers, run /tag @s add eb:admin once to access the admin section.

  • Tag restriction: require a specific tag before players can use the addon
  • Custom required tag name (default: admin)
  • Allow or disable Destroy Mode server-wide
  • Restrict Destroy Mode to Creative only
  • Allow or disable Infinite Reach server-wide
  • Set a server-wide reach distance cap
  • Auto-give the Building Book to new players on join
  • Set a global max blocks cap (up to 300,000)
  • Restrict /config access to the required tag

✦ Commands

  • /menu - Open the Mode Selector
  • /settings - Open player settings
  • /palette - Open the block palette
  • /clipboard - Open the Clipboard Manager
  • /config - Open personal config (preview quality)
  • /tutorial - Open the in-game tutorial
  • /undo - Undo last operation (Creative only)
  • /redo - Redo last operation (Creative only)
  • /getbook - Get a new Building Book (costs 5 XP levels)

FAQ

Is this addon achievemtns friendly? Yes.

Does this work in Survival? Yes. The addon checks your inventory before every placement and only places as many blocks as you're carrying. Undo and Redo are Creative-only, but all build modes and Destroy Mode work fully in Survival.

Does it work on Realms and servers? Yes, as long as the Behavior Pack is applied to the world. Admin controls let you restrict access by tag and limit which features players can use.

Will it conflict with other addons? Effortless Building only interacts with its own custom item (the Building Book) and does not modify any vanilla blocks, entities, or recipes. Conflicts are very unlikely.

What is the maximum blocks per operation? The default cap is 50,000 blocks. Admins can raise the server-wide ceiling up to 300,000. Players can set their personal limit anywhere up to the admin cap.

Are enchantments respected in Destroy Mode? Yes. Fortune, Silk Touch, and Unbreaking all work correctly. Fortune multiplies ore drops, Silk Touch changes what drops, and Unbreaking slows tool wear.

What Minecraft version is required? Bedrock Edition 1.21.100 or later. Left-click (swing) to open the palette requires 1.26.0+.

Inspired by the original Effortless Building Java mod by Requioss.

Join My Discord
packs.author: ExterLeo

packs.name: Raiyon's Java Combat
packs.summary: Have you ever wanted your Bedrock experience to be closer to Java? Well if so, this addon is for you! This addon adds a combat system quite faithful to Java
packs.description:
The cooldown, wich is a certain time when a tool can deal the maximun damage and can be visually seen below the cursor.

Swords with full cooldown bar triggers a sweep attack, damaging nearby mobs.

In Java, axes deals more damage than swords but have longer cooldowns.

Works with tools from any other addon!

Shields no longer push back when blocking.
Shields now block charged mace attacks, just like in Java!
Blocking animation updated to match Java edition.

Damage matches Java mechanics, including Sharpness, Strength, Weakness and tools.
Fully compatibility with tools from other addons.

Try my new Java Saturation & Regeneration Addon! MCPEDL Link

Cooldown Animation

Place the Cooldown Animation below other resource packs if you are using Actions and Stuff or similar.
packs.author: lordraiyon69
